ars_musique.bards_bandeau.controls.help: Select a music disc to play.
ars_musique.bards_bandeau.no_discs: No music discs found in inventory.
ars_musique.page.ars_elemancy: When a focus from Ars Elemancy is equipped, playing music applies additional effects to nearby players and monsters.
ars_musique.page.ars_elemancy.title: with Ars Elemancy
ars_musique.page.ars_elemental: When a focus from Ars Elemental is equipped, playing music applies additional effects to nearby players and monsters.
ars_musique.page.ars_elemental.title: with Ars Elemental
ars_musique.page.bards_bandeau: The Bard's Bandeau is a Curio head item which can be used to play Music Discs. Use the Bard's Bandeau in your main hand (or use the hotkey), then add music discs from your inventory into the Bandeau's inventory. To play a song, use the head Curio hotkey, then select the song to play. Music Discs played with the Bard's Bandeau apply potion effects to nearby Players, and Monsters, until the music stops.
ars_musique.page.disc_specific_effects: The following music discs apply specific effects when played. While any song is playing, the specified effects, plus one random effect, will be applied to 5 Players within 20m. Discs not listed still provide a random effect. Effect constraints, and banlist, can be configured via `ars_musique-server.toml`.
ars_musique.page.effects.focus: With the %s equipped, nearby players receive %s, and nearby monsters receive %s, while any Music Disc is playing.
ars_musique.page.getting_started.one: Combine mystical ingredients in the Enchanting Apparatus to craft Music Discs. Recipes have been provided for every music disc from Minecraft, Ars Nouveau, plus over 100 additional mods.
ars_musique.page.getting_started.title: Ars Musique
ars_musique.page.getting_started.two: Craft a Bard's Bandeau to play Music Discs wherever you go, spreading potion effects to nearby players, and monsters. Wearing Elemental Foci from Ars Elemental, or Ars Elemancy, adds effects based on the focus spell school. See the Bard's Bandeau entry for more details.
ars_musique.readme.short_description: An Ars Nouveau add-on, introducing musical magic.
ars_musique.tooltip.bards_bandeau: Press %s to open the playback controls.
jukebox_song.ars_musique.i_dont_relate_t: f1337 - I Don't Relate To Sadness
jukebox_song.ars_musique.love_is_the_fun: f1337 - Love Is The Function Of Death
jukebox_song.ars_musique.you_teach_me_th: f1337 - You Teach Me The Fine Art Of Dying
